data.title: The Fed's top official strongly supports further rate cuts: preferring to protect jobs over inflation
data.description: New York Fed President John Williams, the third-ranking official of the Federal Reserve, expressed support for further rate cuts this year, despite inflation having deviated from the Fed's 2% target in recent months. His rationale revolves around the already cracked labor market, which Williams hopes to prevent from deepening. He cited slowing monthly job growth and other signs of businesses being more hesitant to hire as reasons for concern. Williams said the Fed has flexibility to support the labor market because the inflation outlook appears less dire than earlier this year. Williams said Trump's tariffs have indeed pushed up prices for some consumer goods, but he expects the impact on inflation to diminish over time, despite the new import taxes Trump has imposed on products such as furniture and pharmaceuticals. Williams said the risk of a further slowdown in the labor market is a significant concern. If the economy develops as expected, with inflation rising to around 3% and the unemployment rate slightly above the current 4.3%, he would support a rate cut this year, "but we have to see what that means." (Jinshi)

data.title: Bitwise CEO: Crypto Investors Are Using 'Ancient Strategies' from Wall Street
data.description: Hunter Horsley, CEO of Bitwise Investments, noted that institutional investors' cryptocurrency investment strategies are shifting from a simple focus on market capitalization to a more refined, stock-market-like investment analysis approach. With the changing macroeconomic environment and US interest rates nearing 4%, investors are placing a greater emphasis on asset quality, similar to stock selection strategies in the stock market. This year, several asset management companies have submitted ETF applications for assets other than Bitcoin, including Bitwise's filing for its AVAX spot ETF. Horsley believes that Bitcoin must first become a recognized store of value before it can develop into a payment network. He also noted that as the ecosystem matures, future market fluctuations may be more moderate than in historical cycles. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Metavesco, a US-listed company, plans to launch OTCfi Pulse, a prediction market platform.
data.description: Metavesco, Inc. (OTC: MVCO), a diversified holding company, announced the upcoming launch of OTCfi Pulse, the first community-based prediction market platform designed specifically for over-the-counter (OTC) stocks. The platform, part of Metavesco's OTCfi Ecosystem project, allows participants to predict the weekly performance of OTC stocks through a transparent sweepstakes competition model. The platform utilizes a deflationary token mechanism, requiring 2,000 OTCfi tokens to earn additional points, 50% of which will be burned and 50% allocated to the Metavesco development wallet. Top participants in the weekly leaderboard will receive OTCfi tokens from the prize pool. CEO Ryan Schadel stated that the platform aims to bring transparency and participation to the OTC community in prediction markets, operating within a compliant framework. If successful, the company plans to expand the platform into an on-chain exchange offering OTC derivatives and futures contracts. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Spot silver prices hit a 14-year high, reaching $50, a record high
data.description: Spot silver prices hit a record high of $49.80 per ounce, a 1.86% intraday increase. The previous high for spot silver was $49.79 per ounce, set in April 2011. The price subsequently reached $50 per ounce, a new all-time high, and has risen by over $21 so far this year, a year-to-date gain of over 70%. (Golden Ten)

data.title: Crypto compliance startup CipherOwl completes $15 million seed round of financing, led by General Catalyst and others
data.description: CipherOwl, a crypto compliance startup, announced the completion of a $15 million seed round of financing, led by General Catalyst and Flourish Ventures, with participation from Coinbase Ventures and Enlight Capital. The company's co-founder and CEO Leo Liang declined to disclose the valuation of this round of financing. (Fortune)

data.title: Amplify ETFs Launches Ethereum Options Income ETF and Income Covered Call ETF
data.description: ETF solutions provider Amplify ETFs announced the launch of the Amplify Ethereum Options Yield ETF (ETTY) and the Amplify Ethereum Yield Covered Call ETF (EHY). These ETFs track Ethereum (ETH) call options and covered call options, respectively, to provide growth exposure and consistent returns on ETH. (Globenewswire)

The announcement is scheduled for Thursday, October 30, 2025, following the close of U.S. financial markets.

data.title: Ethereum's Kohaku Roadmap Aims to Enhance Wallet Privacy and Security
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Ethereum developers have introduced Kohaku, a new roadmap designed to enhance wallet privacy and security through a modular framework. This initiative, announced by Ethereum Foundation coordinator Nicolas Consigny, focuses on creating a set of privacy and security primitives for the Ethereum ecosystem. Kohaku's primary objective is to develop a software development kit (SDK) for building secure wallet functions and a reference wallet to demonstrate these tools in practice. The initial version will be available as a browser extension based on the Ambire wallet, catering to advanced users seeking greater control and privacy.

Kohaku is being developed in collaboration with prominent teams within the Ethereum ecosystem, including Ambire, Railgun, DeFi Wonderland, Helios, and Oblivious Labs. The project is open source, inviting developers to contribute through its GitHub repositories. A key goal of Kohaku is to reduce wallets' reliance on centralized services that can track transactions. The project will feature private sending and receiving, IP address masking, separate accounts for each decentralized application (DApp), and peer-to-peer transaction broadcasting that bypasses standard remote procedure call (RPC) servers. Additionally, Kohaku plans to incorporate social recovery options using tools like ZK Email and Anon Aadhaar, facilitating access restoration without compromising privacy. ZK Email employs zero-knowledge proofs for anonymous email verification, while Anon Aadhaar enables privacy-preserving identity verification.

In the long term, the Kohaku team aims to enhance wallet security to the device level, described as "as close as possible to the silicon." This involves creating a native Ethereum browser where users can safely interact with DApps, IPFS content, and decentralized networks without data leaks. In a related development, the Ethereum Foundation has launched the Privacy Cluster, an initiative bringing together 47 leading researchers, engineers, and cryptographers to develop privacy features at the protocol level of the Ethereum network. This group will collaborate with the Privacy and Scaling Explorations (PSE) team to introduce tools such as private payments, confidential identity systems, and zero-knowledge infrastructure designed to protect user data directly on Ethereum's layer-1 blockchain. The Privacy Cluster encompasses multiple Ethereum Foundation and PSE initiatives, with Kohaku being one of them. Other notable projects include Private Reads & Writes, Private Proving, and Private Identities.

data.title: Spot Silver Reaches Record High of $50 Per Ounce
data.description: According to PANews, spot silver has surged to a historic high, reaching the $50 per ounce mark. This year, the precious metal has increased by over $21, marking a rise of more than 70% in 2025.
